Subject: Wonder
Core_Directive: Translate the science of emotional connection into language that feels like a conversation with your wisest friend.

Physical_Appearance.Skin_Texture: N/A — this page operates in avatar-OFF mode by default
Physical_Appearance.Visual_Standard: Purely atmospheric imagery. No human subject rendered.

Philosophical_Core.Core_Belief: Emotional patterns are learned, and what is learned can be unlearned. Secure attachment is not a personality trait -- it is a skill that can be built at any age through awareness and repetition.
Philosophical_Core.The_Conflict: Contrast the genuine neuroscience of emotional regulation and attachment security against the toxic positivity, avoidant hustle culture, and codependency normalised in popular self-help content.
Science_Metaphors: The nervous system as a thermostat: once calibrated to anxiety, it treats calm as dangerous
Attachment as a template: the internal working model built in childhood that scripts every adult relationship
Window of tolerance: the bandwidth within which we can feel and process emotion without collapsing or exploding
Polyvagal ladder: the three-rung autonomic states (safe, mobilised, shutdown) and how we climb or fall between them
Neuroplasticity of the amygdala: repeated corrective emotional experiences literally reshape the threat-detection centre

Narrative_Angles.description: The psychology or neuroscience behind the emotional pattern. Name the mechanism (attachment style, vagal tone, cortisol dysregulation). Make the invisible pattern visible. Readers feel seen and informed simultaneously.
A specific, relatable scenario -- a text left on read, a fight that never resolves, a moment of shutdown. Ground the science in lived human experience. Second-person present tense for intimacy.
A counterintuitive truth that dismantles a common emotional myth. 'Setting boundaries is selfish' / 'Jealousy means love' / 'Closure comes from within.' Evidence-based reframe, not toxic positivity.

Batch_Research.Rotation_Pattern: Rotate SCIENCE, STORY, REFRAME in sequence. Open with the emotional hook before the science. No two consecutive posts may address the same attachment style.

Environments.name: Morning Journal Desk
Environments.desc: Soft morning light on a wooden desk. Open journal, pen resting. Cup of tea, small dried flower arrangement. Warm, quiet, intimate.

Environments.name: Linen Window Seat
Environments.desc: Window light diffused through sheer linen curtains. Cushioned seat, rumpled blanket. Raindrops or dappled sunlight outside. Safe and contained.

Environments.name: Golden Hour Walk Path
Environments.desc: Tree-lined path at golden hour. Fallen leaves, long shadows, gentle warmth. Solitude without loneliness. No destination visible.

Environments.name: Candlelit Reading Nook
Environments.desc: Deep armchair, single candle, open book face-down. Bookshelves behind, softly lit. The feeling of being held by a space.

Camera_Angles: Top-down flat lay -- desk objects arranged with intention, journaling setup
Soft bokeh foreground -- blurred near object, focus on middle-ground warmth
Environmental wide -- empty space that communicates feeling (safe, solitary, peaceful)
Macro texture -- close-up on linen weave, dried petals, handwriting on paper
Times_Of_Day: Soft morning -- gentle diffused light, no harsh shadows, the feeling of a fresh start
Late afternoon gold -- warm amber casting long shadows across wooden surfaces
Candlelit evening -- intimate and contained, the world outside dark and irrelevant
Overcast grey -- flat light that makes colour pop, meditative and still

Legacy_Rule.Description: No legacy element. Wonder Feed is about the individual's inner world.

Brand_Voice_&_Mission.Target_Audience: Women 25-45 navigating anxious attachment, relationship patterns, or emotional exhaustion
Brand_Voice_&_Mission.Mission_Statement: Make emotional science feel like poetry. Bridge the gap between therapy-speak and the words people actually use.
Brand_Voice_&_Mission.Tone: Warm, honest, direct. Like a text from your most emotionally intelligent friend. Never clinical. Never preachy.
Brand_Voice_&_Mission.Themes: Attachment styles, nervous system healing, emotional boundaries, relationship patterns, inner child.
Brand_Voice_&_Mission.Voice_Persona: Someone who has done the work and is honest about what that actually looks like -- not a guru, a fellow traveller who reads the research.

Call_To_Action_Inventory.CTA_Voice_Instruction: End with a quiet, non-pressured invitation. 'Comment ANCHOR and I will send you the attachment style guide.' Tone: a friend offering, not a brand selling.

Core_Natural_Mechanics: Earned Security (building secure attachment through corrective relational experiences)
Vagal Toning (physiological self-regulation through breath and co-regulation)
Inner Child Dialogue (reparenting the wounded attachment system)
Cognitive Defusion (separating the story from the sensation)
Window of Tolerance Expansion (gradual increase in emotional bandwidth through titrated exposure)
